ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Invoice_Lock), NOT(ISNEW()), NOT(ISBLANK(Invoice_Number__c)), OR( ISCHANGED(New_or_Old_Invoice__c), ISCHANGED( Type__c ), ISCHANGED(Invoice_Number__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invoice Number, Invoice Type and New/Old mode cannot be changed after the record has an invoice number. Contact an administrator.
